description_long: This object is a simple, unadorned hat with a wide, flat brim that extends evenly around the base. The crown is short and cylindrical, with straight vertical sides and a flat top, giving it a utilitarian and minimalist appearance. The brim is broad and slightly flared, providing ample shade and coverage. The surface appears smooth and uniform, with no visible seams, textures, or decorative elements. The color is a consistent light gray, suggesting it may be made from felt, plastic, or a similar material. There are no visible logos, embellishments, or structural variations, emphasizing its functional design.
description: A plain, light gray hat with a wide, flat brim and a short, cylindrical crown. The design is minimalist and lacks any decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flat brim and the short, cylindrical crown with a smooth, featureless surface.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, highlighting the even width of the brim and the straight sides of the crown.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front, with the same wide brim and cylindrical crown visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the uniform brim and crown with no distinguishing marks or features.
